title: Lehsun - Final Refined Version
prompt:
Modify the 'Why Lehsun?' section to include three distinct feature blocks: 'Authentic Roots', 'Regional Mastery', and 'Soul Food' with their respective icons/descriptions from {{DATA:SCREEN:SCREEN_17}}. 
In the 'Signature Dishes' section, remove all price tags. 
Add a '5-star Food Hygiene Rating' label/badge (UK FSA style) in a suitable location, perhaps near the footer or in the 'Order Now' section. 
Remove the newsletter signup form. 
Make the footer slim and minimal, matching the style of {{DATA:SCREEN:SCREEN_12}} or {{DATA:SCREEN:SCREEN_16}}, including Facebook and Instagram icons.
